description: Combined use increases risk of gastrointestinal bleeding and ulcers
recommendation: Avoid concurrent use. Use only one NSAID at a time.

description: Significantly increases bleeding risk due to anticoagulant effects
NSAIDs can potentiate warfarin's anticoagulant effect
recommendation: Avoid if possible. Monitor INR closely if concurrent use necessary.

description: High doses of acetaminophen may increase warfarin effect
recommendation: Use lowest effective dose. Monitor INR.
Limit alcohol consumption. Avoid binge drinking.

description: ACE inhibitors can increase potassium levels dangerously
recommendation: Monitor potassium levels. Avoid potassium supplements unless directed.

description: Grapefruit inhibits statin metabolism, increasing drug levels
Risk of serotonin syndrome when combined
recommendation: Avoid concurrent use. Use alternative pain management.
